title: SUMTree 10.1cm Terracotta Orchid Pots, 6 Pack Terracotta Orchid Pots with Holes and Saucers, Small Terra Cotta Orchid Pot, Plant Flower Pots for Orchid Indoor Outdoor Promotes Air Circulation
features: Breathable Materials: Made of natural red clay, the terracotta plant saucers are of exquisite workmanship, and the making is not complex and just need burning at suitable temperture and thus there appear many small holes on the surface, helping to drain and breathe redundant soils, allowing the roots of plants not to rot, and reducing the growth of disease

Muti-purpose Use: Our terrocotta plant pot with plant saucer is Suitable for some indoor, poorly ventilated or lack of light environment to raise plants, orchids (phalaenopsis, Dendrobium, Cateleland, etc.), African violets, succulents, peace lilies, snake plants, jade plants, herbs, cactus, etc. Great for both indoor and outdoor plant raising

Drainage Hole and Saucers：There are some flower pattern holes on terrocotta plant pot and a small hole on the bottom of the plant pot, allowing more water and air to circulate freely in the pots, draining exccessive water and soil to avoid the rot of the root of plants. The saucers can collect water and soil from the holes, avoiding the erosion of the floor, keeping clean and tidy

Traditional Design: The design and style of our plant pot are matched to all styles of indoor and outdoor places, scenes, which is also a perfect choice to your friends and families. In addition, our plant pots are designed for many kinds of flower pots of different materials, such as terrocotta, ceramic, plastic, glass and so on

Dimensions and Package: our plant pots measures 10.1*8.7cm/4*3.4inch(L*H) and 6 pcs weighs 1440 grams. Each package includes 6*4inch plant pots and 6*3.6inch plant saucers. Please confirm the size and other specifications and package details before you place an order.
